proved: The workspace panel subscribes to the same live Y.Doc as the editor and refreshes on peer updates.
A researcher can create, select, edit title/background, and change workflow status without starting a model.
A researcher can append ordered system, user, or assistant turns through the existing attributed scenario domain.
Support, oppose, abstain, re-vote, and withdrawal use the existing immutable attributed vote ledger and show aggregate counts.
The product explicitly states that the installation researcher identity used for votes is not authenticated.
A detail form refuses to save when any scenario edit identity changed since the form loaded, independent of timestamp order.
Malformed or cyclic scenario graph state is reported accessibly and every scenario mutation control becomes read-only.
The complete workspace suite, frontend suite, production frontend build, 43-check structural audit, and packaged Tauri/NSIS build pass under the watchdog; packaging logged Compiling app v0.1.10.
notProved: Two packaged clients editing the visible scenario panel over Drive or WebSocket transport.
Turn revision/edit/delete UI, branch creation UI, flags/notes UI, labels UI, generation, regeneration, variants, or evaluation.
Authenticated user identity, authorization, moderation, or a trusted distributed clock.
Packaged pointer/focus/screen-reader interaction, narrow-layout usability, or dark-theme visual review.
A signed updater release containing this development checkpoint.
